name: He-man's Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green Bell Pepper; Fine Chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in salted water until tender, then drain.
2. Coat the cooked noodles with butter.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
4. In a large saucepan, mix together cream of mushroom soup, milk, sour cream, salt, onion, pimiento, celery, and green bell pepper.
5. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring frequently, for about 15 minutes.
6. Add the drained tuna to the saucepan and stir to combine.
7. Stir in the cooked noodles until well mixed.
8. Transfer the noodle mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
9. Sprinkle the cracker crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until heated through and lightly golden on top.
11. Garnish with parsley before serving.
Makes enough for 6 hungry men.
